text.en: Adaptive React components with themes you can feel
text.zh: 可感知主题的自适应 React 组件库

tagline.en: One API for desktop and mobile — plus skins, soft/outline language, and copy-ready recipes.
tagline.zh: 同一 API 适配桌面与移动，附带主题皮肤、soft/outline 读法与可抄场景

heading.en: Try themes on the home page

details.en: Table, Modal, Form, Select and more switch desktop / mobile layouts by breakpoint.
details.zh: Table、Modal、Form、Select 等组件按断点自动切换桌面 / 移动布局

details.en: Six built-in data-theme skins, semantic status colors, and live theme switching in docs.
details.zh: 内置 6 套 data-theme 皮肤、语义状态色，文档站可即时切换

details.en: solid / soft / outline / ghost across Button, Tag, Badge, and Alert.
details.zh: Button、Tag、Badge、Alert 统一 solid / soft / outline / ghost

details.en: Sign-in, data list, and settings form slices that feel like a finished product.
details.zh: 登录、列表、设置表单等成品切片，可直接抄进业务
